display-xl.purpose: Hero headline only. One per page. opsz 72.

display-l.purpose: Section openers and final CTA panel.

label.purpose: JetBrains Mono. Eyebrows, section numbers, metadata. The only place caps are allowed.

quote.purpose: Pull quotes and testimonial copy. Italic, no rendered " characters.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Rare one-off depth on overlays. Not for cards at rest.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Scrim under the Calendly modal. Not for marketing surfaces.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Reserved for full-screen overlays. Currently unused.

motion.name: ease-rg
motion.purpose: The custom GSAP ease registered as 'rg'. Default for every motion on the site.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Default. Card hover, nav state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Sole conversion CTA. Always reads 'Book the audit' (or the long form). Tobacco background, Charcoal text, sharp 2px corners.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: #8B6F4E; color: #16191A; border: none; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.625, 0.05, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #A38561; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #7A6044; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8B6F4E; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-label { display: inline-block; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent at rest, Pine Shadow fill on hover. Same dimensions as primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: transparent; color: #DDD3C4; border: 1px solid rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.18); border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.625, 0.05, 0, 1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.625, 0.05, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #1F2D2A; border-color: rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.32); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8B6F4E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: The only elevated surface in the system. Pine Shadow, 4px corners, hairline border. Hover lifts 2px and brightens the border.
components.html:
01 / WELCOME

Welcome sequences

Done-for-you. Written end to end in your voice.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 32px; background: #1F2D2A; color: #DDD3C4; border: 1px solid rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.08); border-radius: 4px; transition: transform 280ms cubic-bezier(0.625, 0.05, 0, 1), border-color 280ms cubic-bezier(0.625, 0.05, 0, 1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.18); } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8B6F4E; margin: 0; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Newsreader', Georgia, serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: #DDD3C4; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.72); margin: 0; }

components.name: Nav Pill
components.description: Floating top-center pill, 44px tall, Pine Shadow background, 999px radius. Geist 14px links inside.
components.html: AboutWorkTestimonialsBook
components.css: .ds-nav-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; background: #1F2D2A; border: 1px solid rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.08); border-radius: 999px; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 12px; height: 100%; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.72); text-decoration: none; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.625, 0.05, 0, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #DDD3C4; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #DDD3C4; box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 #8B6F4E; }

components.name: Pull Quote
components.description: Newsreader italic quote with a Tobacco hairline rule in place of the open-quote character. No " rendered.
components.css: .ds-pullquote { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; max-width: 60ch; margin: 0; } .ds-pullquote-body { position: relative; margin: 0; padding-top: 16px; font-family: 'Newsreader', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.45; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: #DDD3C4; } .ds-pullquote-body::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 24px; height: 1px; background: #8B6F4E; } .ds-pullquote-attr { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.72); }

components.name: Eyebrow + Section Number
components.description: Editorial metadata that precedes every section heading. Mono number in Linen-faint, Tobacco eyebrow label below.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-eyebrow-num { color: rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.32); } .ds-eyebrow-label { color: #8B6F4E; }

components.name: Portrait Video Testimonial
components.description: Portrait MP4 in a 9:16 frame with circular Tobacco play button overlay. Inline replace on click — no modal.
components.css: .ds-portrait-video { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; max-width: 320px; margin: 0; } .ds-portrait-video-frame { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 9 / 16; background: #1F2D2A; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-portrait-video-poster { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .ds-portrait-video-play { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; background: #8B6F4E; color: #16191A; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.625, 0.05, 0, 1); } .ds-portrait-video-play:hover { background: #A38561; } .ds-portrait-video-play:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #DDD3C4; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-portrait-video-duration { position: absolute; right: 8px; bottom: 8px; padding: 4px 8px; background: rgba(22, 25, 26, 0.6); color: #DDD3C4; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-portrait-video-caption { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-portrait-video-author { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #DDD3C4; } .ds-portrait-video-desc { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.72); line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview:
A dim, quiet space where every surface is considered and nothing shouts. Charcoal walls, lamp-warm Tobacco accents, restrained editorial typography — the visual equivalent of a small luxury hotel in winter. The brand pillar is editorial restraint: whitespace doing work, one italic accent word per headline, no caps-lock claims, no exclamation marks, no growth-chart screenshots, no purple gradients pretending to be premium. The site itself is the product demo for Rudy's craft, so its surfaces have to read the way his copy reads — thoughtful, direct, confident without bragging.

This system explicitly rejects the surrounding category. Marketing-agency energy (stock people on laptops, 'trusted by 10,000+ teams' lies), direct-response screamer pages (red CTAs, countdown timers, 'ONLY 3 SPOTS LEFT' badges), Web 2.0 freelancer sites (purple gradients, sparkle emoji framing, glassmorphism), generic SaaS (mesh gradients, isometric illustrations, the hero-metric template), and Demo2 energy (stacked marquees + pulsing socials + Anton on Anton + autoplay carousel + Lottie + testimonial slider firing in the same viewport) are all out. Quiet luxury hotel, not Times Square billboard.
keyCharacteristics: Dark by default. Charcoal carries ~60% of any view; lamp-warm Tobacco appears only when something must be noticed.
Editorial serif up top, sans-serif body, mono for eyebrows and metadata. No fourth family. Ever.
Sharp corners (2–4px). No round-rect SaaS softness. No glassmorphism. No mesh gradients.
Hairline borders for elevation, not shadows. Cards lift via border-color shift + 2px translateY.
Left-asymmetric layouts. One italic accent word per headline. One [data-reveal] per section. Restful for ≥80% of any 5-second motion window.

rules.name: The 60/30/10 Rule
rules.body: Every viewport reads as ~60% Charcoal, ~30% Pine Shadow + Linen text, ~10% Tobacco. If a screenshot has Tobacco on more than 10% of pixels, the page is overheated. Pull it back.

rules.name: The Tobacco Budget
rules.body: Tobacco appears only as: (1) the primary CTA, (2) the single italic accent word inside a display headline, (3) JetBrains-Mono eyebrows, (4) link hover, (5) hairline rules. Five slots, total. Body copy in Tobacco is a build-breaker.

rules.name: The No-Status-Color Rule
rules.body: No bright red error, no green success, no traffic-light states. State changes use weight, opacity, underline, or border-color shift. Tobacco is the only saturated color in the system; everything else is the Pine/Linen family.

rules.name: The Anti-Mid-Section Rule
rules.body: Pine and Pine Shadow may not share the same hierarchy in one view — they read muddy together. Pick one elevation per section.

rules.name: The One Italic Rule
rules.body: A display headline gets one — and only one — italic accent word. 'Email copy that quietly prints money.' The italic is the emphasis; weight contrast is not added on top. Two italics in a headline is a build-breaker.

rules.name: The Serif-Up Sans-Down Rule
rules.body: Newsreader for H1–H3 + pull quotes. Geist for H4–H5 + body. JetBrains Mono for eyebrows / numbers / metadata only. Geist anywhere above H4 — wrong. A fourth typeface — wrong.

rules.name: The No-Italic-Body Rule
rules.body: Newsreader italic carries personality and is reserved for headline accents. Body copy stays roman, even when emphasis is wanted; reach for weight or a structural break instead.

rules.name: The 1.5+ Line-Height Floor
rules.body: Body line-height is never below 1.5. Reads cramped otherwise and breaks the editorial mood.

rules.name: The Borders-Over-Shadows Rule
rules.body: Card depth is conveyed by 1px hairline borders at rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.08) (raised to 0.18 on hover), never by box-shadow. Shadow tokens exist for overlays only.

rules.name: The No-Drop-Shadow-On-Text Rule
rules.body: Text is never elevated with text-shadow. Hierarchy comes from scale, weight, and color, not from atmospherics.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Elevation appears only as a response to state (hover lifts a card by 2px and shifts its border color toward Linen, focus rings show a 2px Tobacco outline).

dos: Do use Charcoal (#16191A) for ~60% of every view, Pine Shadow (#1F2D2A) for any elevated surface, and Tobacco (#8B6F4E) only as CTA / italic accent / eyebrow / link hover / hairline.
Do keep type strictly within Newsreader + Geist + JetBrains Mono. Three families. Final.
Do italicise exactly one accent word per display headline. Zero or one — never two.
Do lift cards on hover by 2px translateY + border color shift to rgba(221, 211, 196, 0.18). Border, not shadow.
Do cap body line length at 65–75ch and keep body line-height at 1.5 or above.
Do keep the site restful for at least 80% of any 5-second motion window. One [data-reveal] per section.
Do make every primary CTA read 'Book the audit' (or, in long-form sections, 'Book a free 20-minute email audit'). Pick one phrasing per page and stay with it.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — every GSAP timeline, every Lenis instance, every reveal bails when it's set.
Do keep focus rings visible: outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 2px;. Never outline: none without an equivalent replacement.
donts: Don't introduce any color outside Charcoal / Pine Shadow / Pine / Tobacco / Linen. No red error, no green success, no Instagram-gradient social icons.
Don't put Tobacco on body text. Tobacco is the lamp, not the wallpaper.
Don't place Pine and Pine Shadow side-by-side at the same hierarchy in one view — reads muddy.
Don't mix in a third typeface, use Geist above H4, justify text, italicise body copy, or center body copy.
Don't round corners above 8px. Sharp corners are the editorial signature.
Don't ship gradient text, side-stripe borders (border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent), or glassmorphism as default.
Don't ship the hero-metric template (big number + small label + supporting stats + gradient accent). SaaS cliché.
Don't ship identical card grids (same-sized icon + heading + text cards, repeated). Vary structure and density.
Don't scale, translate, or drop-shadow buttons on hover. Color change only.
Don't loop animations on text or logos. No bouncy or elastic easing. No 3D transforms, no perspective tricks, no parallax beyond ~8% movement.
Don't ship direct-response screamer page moves — no big red CTAs, no 'ONLY 3 SPOTS LEFT' badges, no countdown timers, no fake urgency.
Don't ship Web 2.0 freelancer site moves — no purple gradients, no 'I'm a creative ✨' framing, no drop shadows on text.
Don't ship generic SaaS moves — no mesh gradients, no isometric illustrations, no 'trusted by 10,000+' lies.
Don't ship Demo2 energy — stacked marquees, pulsing socials, Anton on Anton, autoplay carousel + Lottie + testimonial slider firing at once. The opposite of that.
Don't ship marketing-agency energy — stock photos of laptops/lightbulbs/growth charts, 'team' pages.
Don't reintroduce the old Rudy moves: circular face logo, the '$15K in 90 days' guarantee, listed pricing, emoji-prefixed service cards.
Don't add a second integration with its own CTA. Calendly is the only conversion surface; no newsletter signup, no PDF download, no exit-intent overlay, no live chat, no contact form.
